title: AgenticWork Skill frontmatter
description: The YAML frontmatter block at the top of every skills/<name>/SKILL.md. `name` + `description` are always resident in model context (progressive disclosure); everything else is metadata the lint/eval harness reads. Additional keys are rejected so a typo'd field fails CI instead of silently doing nothing.

name.description: Skill id. MUST equal the parent directory name (kebab-case). Always resident in context.

description.description: WHEN to use the skill (a trigger), not HOW. Always resident in context, so keep it tight.

version.description: Optional semver of the skill content.

license.description: SPDX id. Repo default is Apache-2.0; a skill that references an upstream under a different license declares it here.

renderPath.description: If set, the skill teaches authoring an artifact and its examples are gated through that render path's transpile + validator. `react-inline-artifact` = render_artifact kind:react -> parent esbuild-wasm transpile -> sandboxed iframe.

imports.description: The import allowlist (cage) the skill's authored components may use. MUST be a subset of the render path's allowlist; the lint cross-checks it against the live transpiler cage.

themeTokens.description: Declares the theme contract the skill teaches. The lint asserts examples obey it.

requireLiveAccent.description: Examples must reference var(--cm-accent) and never bake a domain accent literal (#1187 class).

examples.description: Worked-example components (under examples/) the static lint must transpile clean AND pass the inline-artifact validator. Each entry is a relative .tsx path; an optional sibling <file>.meta.json may declare expectViewBox etc.

eval.description: Behavioral-eval (LLM-linter) configuration. Read only by the gated behavioral job.

tasks.description: Relative paths to eval task prompts (eval/*.task.md). Each is fed to the model with the skill body; the authored output is gated by the same transpile + validator.

runsPerTask.description: How many times each task is sampled (stochastic pass-rate).

passRateThreshold.description: Minimum fraction of (task x run) attempts that must transpile + validate clean for the behavioral gate to pass.
